# Ruturaj Chaubey

> Full Stack Engineer with 3+ years of experience building scalable, high-performance web applications. Based in Pune, India.

Ruturaj Chaubey is a Full Stack Engineer at QED42, where he architects headless Drupal and Next.js solutions for enterprise clients including UNICEF and US-based organisations. He is an active Drupal community speaker and open source contributor.

- Email: ruturajchaubey16@gmail.com
- Location: Pune, India
- GitHub: https://github.com/RChaubey16
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/ruturajchaubey

## Skills & Technologies

Languages: TypeScript, JavaScript, Go, Python, PHP
Frontend: React, Next.js, Tailwind CSS
Backend: Node.js, NestJS, FastAPI, Drupal (headless/decoupled)
Databases & Infra: PostgreSQL, Supabase, Docker
CMS: Drupal, Sanity

## Experience

- Full Stack Engineer at QED42 — Architected headless Drupal + Next.js platforms for enterprise clients; led front-end for a UNICEF-affiliated product; mentored interns; delivered internal sessions on decoupled Drupal starter kits.
- Associate Engineer at QED42 — Built and maintained decoupled web applications; contributed to open source Drupal modules.
- Intern at QED42 — Learned Drupal development fundamentals and contributed to client projects.

## Projects

- [Knowbase](https://ruturajchaubey.com/projects) — Multi-tenant knowledge base SaaS where teams store and search documents using AI.
- [Atlas](https://ruturajchaubey.com/projects) — Production-style microservices backend built with NestJS demonstrating scalable architecture patterns.
- [Blink](https://ruturajchaubey.com/projects) — Fast, minimal URL shortener.
- [React Keyquence](https://ruturajchaubey.com/projects) — Lightweight React library for keyboard sequence detection.
- [What the Hex](https://ruturajchaubey.com/projects) — Fast color lookup tool for developers and designers.
- [DevConnector](https://ruturajchaubey.com/projects) — Social networking platform for developers.

## Talks

- Inside Drupal CMS 2.0: Visual Building, AI, and Site Templates
- Everything AI in Drupal: Past, Present, and What's Next
- From Static to Dynamic: Next.js Rendering Patterns with Drupal CMS
- All about Drupal CMS
- Transforming Experiences: A Guide to Transform API and Decoupled Layout Builder in Drupal
